notes: Per-site land cover at three aggregation levels. Native LCCS code (lulc_native = cci_native_class) from original extraction. Level 2 (lulc_level2, 22 classes) derived from native using LCCS hierarchy. High-level (lulc_highlevel, 10 classes) from ESA CCI PUG Table 2. No re-extraction performed for this update.
